page_content:
THET286 Experiential Learning I (1-3 Credits)

Introductory internship in theatre. Constructed to help students in their sophomore year gain practical experience in a supportive work environment in the theatre. Student must research and propose internship to a Faculty Advisor and Internship Venue.

Prerequisite: THET222, THET223, and THET116. And THET114;

or TDPS201. And permission of ARHU-School of Theatre, Dance & Performance Studies department.
